wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q97200770 vs Q7542677
Мали мост - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q2845812 vs Q4441190
Стари железнички мост - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q12754829 vs Q27868701
Rrjedha e Thellë - an affected OSM element that may be improved
